issues.detail: Skill file lacks at least two realistic usage examples.

scenarios.name: Scaffold a multi-feature Flask app with auth
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the application factory create_app pattern, separate extensions.py module, blueprints registered with url_prefix, and TestConfig for tests as documented; baseline often uses a single app.py with app = Flask(__name__) at module level and db.create_all(), which the skill explicitly warns against.

scenarios.name: Set up database migrations for an existing Flask app
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses Flask-Migrate via flask --app app db init/migrate/upgrade and rejects db.create_all() in production, plus initializes migrate via init_app inside create_app; baseline frequently recommends raw Alembic or db.create_all(), missing the skill's prescribed pattern.
